title: Listafjorden

infobox.value: This [Agder](/wiki/Agder "Agder") location article is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Listafjorden&action=edit).

This article about a [fjord](/wiki/Fjord "Fjord") in [Norway](/wiki/Norway "Norway") is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Listafjorden&action=edit).

is a widely shaped fjord (or bay) between the island of [Hidra](/wiki/Hidra_(island) "Hidra (island)") and the [Lista](/wiki/Lista "Lista") peninsula in [Agder](/wiki/Agder "Agder") county, [Norway](/wiki/Norway "Norway"). The fjord is located in the municipalities [Farsund](/wiki/Farsund "Farsund") and [Flekkefjord](/wiki/Flekkefjord "Flekkefjord"). The 10 kilometres (6.2 mi) long and about the same distance wide at its mouth. The fjord heads inland and right after it passes the island of [Andabeløya](/wiki/Andabel%C3%B8ya "Andabeløya"), it splits in two branches: the [Fedafjorden](/wiki/Fedafjorden "Fedafjorden") and the [Stolsfjorden](/w/index.php?title=Stolsfjorden&action=edit&redlink=1 "Stolsfjorden (page does not exist)").[[1]](#cite_note-snl-1)

[Godal, Anne Marit](/wiki/Anne_Marit_Godal "Anne Marit Godal") (ed.). ["Listafjorden"](http://snl.no/Listafjorden). *[Store norske leksikon](/wiki/Store_norske_leksikon "Store norske leksikon")* (in Norwegian). Norsk nettleksikon. Retrieved 24 November 2012.

**Listafjorden** is a widely shaped fjord (or bay) between the island of [Hidra](/wiki/Hidra_(island) "Hidra (island)") and the [Lista](/wiki/Lista "Lista") peninsula in [Agder](/wiki/Agder "Agder") county, [Norway](/wiki/Norway "Norway"). The fjord is located in the municipalities [Farsund](/wiki/Farsund "Farsund") and [Flekkefjord](/wiki/Flekkefjord "Flekkefjord"). The 10 kilometres (6.2 mi) long and about the same distance wide at its mouth. The fjord heads inland and right after it passes the island of [Andabeløya](/wiki/Andabel%C3%B8ya "Andabeløya"), it splits in two branches: the [Fedafjorden](/wiki/Fedafjorden "Fedafjorden") and the [Stolsfjorden](/w/index.php?title=Stolsfjorden&action=edit&redlink=1 "Stolsfjorden (page does not exist)").[[1]](#cite_note-snl-1)
